sentences.english: I'm lucky because my neighbors are really quiet and friendly.
sentences.korean: 운이 좋게도 이웃이 정말 조용하고 친절해요.

sentences.english: We sometimes share food and help each other out.
My upstairs neighbor is so noisy.
He plays loud music at night and it drives me crazy.
sentences.korean: 밤에 큰 음악을 틀어서 미칠 것 같아요.

sentences.english: I don't really know my neighbors, to be honest.
We just say hello in the hallway and that's about it.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
